name: Life Skills

rituals.title: Pack Backpack
rituals.description: Choose the items Tanuki needs for the day.

rituals.title: Brush Teeth
rituals.description: Help Tanuki brush their teeth until the sparkle bar is full.

rituals.title: Healthy Snack
rituals.description: Pick the snack that gives Tanuki steady energy.

rituals.title: Kindness Moment
rituals.description: Choose a kind action Tanuki could take today.

affirmations: Your habits are growing your magic.
You’re becoming more responsible every day.
You’re taking great care of your future self.
